brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: No excuses, just results! These Seamless Sage Green Leggings are your workout warrior – 100% squat-proof and ridiculously comfortable. Stop wishing, start doing! #ArrowowActive #SquatProof #NoExcuses
strategy.cta: Ready to conquer your goals? Tap to shop now and feel the difference! ➡️ [Link to product/website]
strategy.hook: Squatting into the week like a boss with Arrowow Active! 💪

script.visuals: Sienna Bondi (athletic, lean build, messy blonde high ponytail), in a brightly lit modern gym with free weights. She's holding her phone selfie-style, slightly above eye level, with a slight handheld shake. She finishes a deep squat rep, looking empowered, then quickly adjusts her ponytail.
script.dialogue: Squatting into the week like a boss with Arrowow Active! 💪
script.tone: High energy, slightly breathless, encouraging, Australian (Sydney, casual, energetic) accent

script.visuals: Jump cut. Close-up on the Seamless Sage Green Leggings, then Sienna demonstrating a deep, full squat, emphasizing zero sheerness and full range of motion. Clean girl makeup, bright blue eyes fixed on the camera.
character_actions: Performs a deep squat demonstrating the leggings' properties
script.dialogue: Alright team, Quick reality check: No excuses, just results! These Seamless Sage Green Leggings? Absolutely 100% squat-proof, and seriously, ridiculously comfortable.
script.tone: Tough-love, authentic, energetic, Australian (Sydney, casual, energetic) accent

script.visuals: Jump cut. Sienna takes a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup, making direct eye contact and nodding with a determined smile. Then, she casually wipes a small amount of sweat from her forehead.
script.dialogue: Stop wishing, start doing! We're not here to mess around. You gotta feel good to crush those goals, right?
script.tone: Encouraging, genuine, slightly breathless, Australian (Sydney, casual, energetic) accent

script.visuals: Jump cut. Sienna performs a dynamic lunge, showcasing the incredible stretch and comfort of the leggings. The camera follows her movement dynamically.
script.dialogue: The comfort on these is insane. Gets you through every rep, no distractions. #ArrowowActive #SquatProof #NoExcuses
script.tone: Enthusiastic, authentic, Australian (Sydney, casual, energetic) accent

script.visuals: Jump cut. Sienna looks directly into the camera with an encouraging yet firm smile. Her expression is determined, embodying the 'hype girl' vibe. Slight handheld shake persists.
script.dialogue: Ready to conquer your goals? Tap to shop now and feel the difference! ➡️ [Link to product/website]
script.tone: Direct, motivating, Australian (Sydney, casual, energetic) accent

text_critic_report.feedback: The script contains the phrase 'Tap to shop now', which is a direct call to action for purchasing. This goes against the persona's rule: 'She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.' It is too similar in intent to the prohibited phrases like 'Buy this product now' and 'Link in bio'.
